description_long: This bungalow is a single-story residential building with a compact rectangular footprint, surrounded by a white fence and lush landscaping including several palm trees and a row of dense deciduous trees at the rear. The structure features a gable roof with a small dormer, and the exterior walls are finished in a combination of brick and light-colored siding. The front of the house has a small covered porch with steps leading up to the entrance, flanked by two parked cars on a paved driveway. The backyard includes a patio area with outdoor furniture and an umbrella, providing a private outdoor living space. Windows are arranged asymmetrically, with larger panes facing the front and side, and smaller windows on the rear and dormer. The overall style is modern with clean lines and minimal ornamentation, blending natural and built elements harmoniously.
description: A modern single-story bungalow with a gable roof, brick and light siding, surrounded by a white fence, palm trees, and a rear row of dense trees. Features include a front porch, driveway with cars, and a furnished backyard patio.
description_view_0: Front view showing the entrance porch, two parked cars, palm trees, and the main facade with large windows.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the brick wall, dormer, backyard patio with umbrella, and dense trees along the rear fence.
description_view_2: Rear view dominated by the row of dense trees, backyard area, and the back of the bungalow with smaller windows.
description_view_3: Angled rear-side view showing the driveway, cars, backyard patio, and the mix of palm and deciduous trees.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped front and side windows
